_comment: Windows-native variant of hooks.json for the MANUAL install path. integrate.py / upgrade.py auto-render the right interpreter into .cursor/hooks.json, so you only need this file if you wire hooks up by hand. It uses the `py` launcher (shipped with the python.org installer and on PATH by default); if you have no `py` launcher, change `py -3` to `python`. The pure-Python runner is bit-for-bit compatible with the POSIX .sh scripts. Requires Python 3.9+.
